recommendations.title: Section 8
recommendations.overview: After avenging the murder of his family, a former soldier is sprung from prison and recruited by a shadowy government agency.

recommendations.title: Icarus
recommendations.overview: Trained KGB assassin, Edward Genn (code name ICARUS), worked years ago as a sleeper agent in America. But when the Soviet Union collapsed, he quickly found himself in a foreign country with no one to trust. Determined to escape his muddled existence,

recommendations.title: Mike & Nick & Nick & Alice
recommendations.overview: Two gangsters and the woman they love try to survive the most dangerous night of their lives. As if that wasn’t enough, there’s one wild ingredient added to the mix: a time machine.

recommendations.title: The Best Man
recommendations.overview: Mercenaries seize control of a remote resort hotel during a wedding and it's up to the best man, the groom and their drunken best friend to stop the terrorists and save the hostages.

recommendations.title: The Hummingbird Project
recommendations.overview: A pair of high-frequency traders go up against their old boss in an effort to make millions in a fiber-optic cable deal.

recommendations.title: One in the Chamber
recommendations.overview: A seasoned assassin plays both sides in a Russian gang war and becomes the target of an unknown enemy.

recommendations.title: Hell Ride
recommendations.overview: Two rival bikers gangs, the Victors and the Six-Six-Six's, refuel their decades-old rivalry.

recommendations.title: The Expendables 2
recommendations.overview: Mr. Church reunites the Expendables for what should be an easy paycheck, but when one of their men is murdered on the job, their quest for revenge puts them deep in enemy territory and up against an unexpected threat.

recommendations.title: Silent Trigger
recommendations.overview: Waxman is a former Special Forces soldier who is now working as a heavily armed assassin for a top secret government agency. When a covert mission goes terribly wrong, Waxman and fellow assassin Clegg become that agency's prime targets.

recommendations.title: Tactical Force
recommendations.overview: A training exercise for the LAPD SWAT Team goes terribly wrong when they find themselves pitted against two rival gangs while trapped in an abandoned Hangar, armed with nothing but blanks.
